tools.Name: MarkItDown
tools.Description: A lightweight Python utility for converting various file formats (PDF, PPT, Word, Excel, Images, etc.) to Markdown for use with LLMs.
tools.Use_Case: Preparing diverse document types as clean, token-efficient Markdown inputs for RAG or text analysis pipelines.

tools.Name: VoxCPM2
tools.Description: A 2B-parameter, tokenizer-free, diffusion-based text-to-speech model supporting 30 languages with 48kHz output quality.
tools.Use_Case: Real-time multilingual voice synthesis, creative voice design from text, and high-fidelity controllable voice cloning.

tools.Name: DeepTutor
tools.Description: An agent-native platform designed for personalized learning, featuring a unified workspace that supports chat, deep research, quiz generation, and math animation.
tools.Use_Case: Creating persistent, autonomous AI tutors with long-term memory that can execute complex, multi-step research and learning plans.
